name: emit_year_match case 6: multi-year year_default with range year_offset offset-expands the adp CTE
description: player_adp with year=[2022,2023] + year_offset=[1,2] offset-expands the adp_format CTE year filter and the join correlation to the cross-product target set IN(2023,2024,2025), and reduces the range window with the column-declared AVG aggregate (ADP is a mean, not additive). Regression guard for the year_offset-drop bug in the CTE-attach source bridge.
expected_query: with "t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f" as (select "player_adp_index"."pid", "player_adp_index"."year", "player_adp_index"."adp", "player_adp_index"."min_pick", "player_adp_index"."max_pick", "player_adp_index"."std_dev", "player_adp_index"."sample_size", "player_adp_index"."percent_drafted" from "player_adp_index" inner join "adp_format" on "player_adp_index"."adp_format_id" = "adp_format"."id" where "player_adp_index"."source_id" in ('SLEEPER') and "player_adp_index"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "adp_format"."scoring_class" in ('PPR') and "adp_format"."num_qb" in (1) and "adp_format"."duration" in ('REDRAFT') and "adp_format"."draft_pool" in ('ALL') and "adp_format"."contest_style" in ('MANAGED') and "player_adp_index"."adp" < 999), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT AVG(t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f.adp) FROM t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f WHERE t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f.pid = player.pid AND t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f.year IN (2023,2024,2025)) AS "adp_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f" on "t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) where player.pos IN ('QB') and t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f.adp >= '10' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
